rulings.Case Title: EST. OF DONALD EUGENE CHERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Jan Cherry Spears As Administrator
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, depiste the following uncleared issues (see tentative ruling for 01/14/2025 hearing): 1) No citation has been issued by the clerk. It should be noted that no prior court order is required for the clerk's issuance of a citation. See Probate Code section 8500(b). 2) No proof of service of a citation on the administrator is on file. A citation must be served in the manner required by CCP sections 413.10 et seq. at least 5 days before the hearing. See section 1242. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: EST. OF DONALD EUGENE CHERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following uncleared issues (see tentative ruling for 01/14/2025 hearing): 1) The word "AMENDED" (petition) must be inserted at item 2 of the DE-121 form. 2) Christian Cherry must be removed from items 2 & 3 of the DE-121 form. 3) Item 4a of proof of service attached to the DE-121 form shows 01/08/2025 as the date of mailing, less than 15 days before the 01/14/2025 hearing. New notice of the continued hearing must be given with a copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) attached thereto. 4) Exhibit B attached to the supplement filed on 01/08/2025 indicates that Lanoo Cherry and Neneh Cherry are citizens of Sweden, in which case notice of the amended petition must be given to the Swedish Consulate. See section 8113. If Christian Cherry is a citizen of Denmark, notice must also be given to the Danish Consulate. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TEDMAN MARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues: 1) Gold chains and other tangible personal property, 1996 BMW, and Hyatt timeshare in Carmel, CA (identified as assets on hand and sought to be distributed non-pro rata to the petitioner individually) have not been inventoried and appraised. 2) $404,005.09 costs advanced by the petitioner and disclosed in her supplement include: i) Funeral expenses in excess of $45,000, but no creditor claim has been filed, nor has the petition sought the Court's approval of the claim of the personal representative. See sections 9000(a)(3) & 9252; see also LRSF 14.29. ii) $2,375 paid to the guardian ad litem as his fees, but the Court has not approved any fees or payment source. See section 1003(c). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ENRIGHT FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Demand Of Property Tax Reimbursement
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 04/29/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) Notice is insufficient. Notice must be given at least 30 days before the hearing (Probate Code Section 17203.) 2) The names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries must be listed in the petition. (CRC 7.902) Please address the above issues and provide courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than April 15, 2025, to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Original statements or computer-generated printouts of bank statements must be FILED. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated statements. An examiner is not the keeper of FILED records. If $88.76 in attorney costs exceeding the retainer advanced by the executor was paid out of the estate on 5/6/24, why is that amount not reflected in Schedule D? Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MOHAMMAD AMIN YOUSEF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/16/25. Examiner's Notes with the following issues have been sent: 1) Item 5a is incomplete. Please read the directions carefully  all applicable boxes must be checked. 2) Item 6f is marked, but Petitioner alleges that Petitioner is the surviving spouse. The first applicable box must be marked. 3) Item 2a is marked, but it does not appear that Petitioner is requesting that a will be admitted. 4) Petitioner requests waiver of bond but Item 3e was not completed. It is noted that a minor cannot waive bond, and the minimum bond is $20,000.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT EDWARD HAYWOOD
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing Status of closing the estate will be set for 4/7/26. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 4/7/26. Appearance will be required on that status date if no petition has been filed. (No notice is ordinarily required of a supplement. [See CRC 7.3 and 7.53.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS H CHIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/16/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to petitioner with the following issues: 1) The caption of the petition does not match the body of the petition. Please confirm whether Petitioner is requesting full authority under the Independent Administration of Estate of Act. 2) Petition requests her appointment as executor; however, there is no one nominated under the will. 3) The will was not witnessed. 4) Proposed order has not been filed (which must be completed with the assumption that the petition will be granted as requested). 5) DE-147S has not been filed (which must be attached to a cover sheet, indicating that it is a confidential filing). 6) Proof of Publication has not been filed.
